name: source-picker
title: Monitor Source Picker
description: Floating popup for choosing a metric source while building a widget. Pairs a sticky search field with a selectable monitor table, composing two atoms — the search-input header and the table-row table base (uppercase sticky head, hairline rules, hover sweep, status dot, mono IP cells) — then layers on source-specific affordances: a per-row checkbox, group-path and tag pills, and a footer summary. Selection is multi-select via checkboxes with a tri-state select-all in the header (the row fill is derived from checkbox state with :has()), and the search filters rows live with a no-results empty state. Renders in-flow open by default or as an anchored --floating popup that a trigger field toggles; Escape and outside-click dismiss the floating variant.
